docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-13-2026 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUL-13-2026 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PATRICK G WAITES IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM VOICE. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
